query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_telstra_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN connectionId IS NOT NULL AND connectionId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_connection_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN externalId IS NOT NULL AND externalId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_external_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'flagged' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as flagged,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'active' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cancelled
FROM services 
WHERE supplierName = 'Telstra';
